f64_fixture_version: pending — fixture not yet generated (see f64_certification_status)
f64_certification_status: INFRASTRUCTURE READY, EVIDENCE PENDING (CERTIFY-BREADTH-1). Gemma-3-1B is the SMALLEST of the three targets and the only one whose F64 reference (~8 GiB peak) fits a typical 16 GiB box, so it is the recommended first model to actually certify. To fill the null drift below: (1) `python tests/fixtures/generate_f64_reference.py models/gemma-3-1b-it tests/fixtures/gemma3_1b_reference`; (2) `GEMMA3_1B_DIR=models/gemma-3-1b-it cargo test --test certify_breadth_f64_validation_test --release -- --ignored gemma3_1b_atenia_f32_matches_f64 --nocapture`; (3) transcribe the printed max_abs_diff + argmax into certified_mode below. NO number is recorded until that run produces it. Caveat: Gemma 3 alternates local-sliding-window (window 512) and global attention layers; the text builder ships full causal attention, which is mathematically equivalent only for contexts shorter than the window — the 4-token fixture is well within it, but longer-context drift is a separate follow-up.
config_compatibility_notes: Gemma 3 (text) extends the Gemma 2 deltas with per-head QK-Norm and dual-RoPE (global layers use rope_theta=1e6, local sliding-window layers use rope_local_base_freq=1e4, period sliding_window_pattern=6). The Gemma3ForCausalLM text path is validated functionally (MODEL_FAMILY_VALIDATION.md); this manifest wires the numeric-certification slot, which is EVIDENCE PENDING.

certified_mode.kernel_path: CPU F32 graph execution (ADR-004 primary metric, via certify_breadth harness) and/or GPU TF32 (cuda_matmul_bf16_inplace) — both pending evidence
certified_mode.validation_notes: No F64 reference generated yet. See f64_certification_status for the exact reproduction recipe. No number fabricated.

fast_mode.validation_notes: Fast-mode drift uncharacterised; functionally validated only (MODEL_FAMILY_VALIDATION.md).

recommended_mode_rationale: Conservative default while the F64 evidence is pending — certified mode (the reference numeric path) until a real drift number is recorded.
per_tensor_policy_status: Reserved — no per-tensor fast routing claimed until the whole-model F64 drift is measured.

verification.note: EVIDENCE PENDING — this manifest wires the certification slot; it does not yet claim a measured drift envelope.
